flow.comment:
desc = Validate registration DTO structure and required fields. 
inputs = [ {"name": "registrationDTO", "type": "RegistrationDTO", "source": "request"} ] 
outputs = [ {"name": "validatedUserData", "type": "ValidatedUserData", "target": "context"} ] 
exceptions = ["ValidationException"]

desc = Verify email address is not already registered. 
inputs = [ {"name": "validatedUserData", "type": "ValidatedUserData", "source": "context"} ] 
exceptions = ["TimeoutException", "ConflictException"] 
sideEffects = false 
idempotent = true 
consistencyScope = none

desc = Reject registrations from known disposable or temporary email domains using a maintained blocklist. 
inputs = [ {"name": "validatedUserData", "type": "ValidatedUserData", "source": "context"} ] 
outputs = [ {"name": "emailAllowed", "type": "bool", "target": "context"} ] 
exceptions = ["DisposableEmailDetected"] 
auditRequired = true 
llmPriority = high

desc = Persist new user account with hashed credentials. 
inputs = [ {"name": "validatedUserData", 
"type": "ValidatedUserData", "source": "context"} ] 
outputs = [ {"name": "userId", "type": "UUID", "target": "context"}, 
{"name": "email", "type": "String", "target": "context"} ] 
exceptions = ["TimeoutException"] 
sideEffects = true 
idempotent = false 
consistencyScope = local-transaction 
transactional = true 
auditRequired = true 
llmPriority = high

desc = Handle timeout – log failure and return error response. 
Called regardless of which action triggered timeout, userId may not be available. 
inputs = [ {"name": "userId", "type": "UUID?", "source": "context"} ] 
outputs = [ {"name": "errorResponse", "type": "ErrorResponse", "target": "response"} ] 
postCondition = registrationStatus_Failed

desc = Send activation email with confirmation link. 
inputs = [ {"name": "userId", "type": "UUID", "source": "context"}, 
{"name": "email", "type": "String", "source": "context"} ] 
outputs = [ {"name": "emailSentStatus", "type": "bool", "target": "context"} ] 
exceptions = ["TimeoutException"] 
retryPolicy = {"maxAttempts": 3, "backoffMs": 300, "retryOn": ["Timeout", "502", "503"], 
"onRetryExhausted": "raise"}

desc = Mark registration as complete and set user status active. 
inputs = [ {"name": "userId", "type": "UUID", "source": "context"} ] 
outputs = [ {"name": "requestId", "type": "UUID", "target": "response"} ] 
postCondition = userStatus_Active 
sideEffects = true 
idempotent = true 
consistencyScope = local-transaction 
transactional = true
